name: DynaGrynd
summary: The DynaGrynd is DynaVap's purpose-built herb preparation accessory, engineered with vaporiser performance in mind.
description: The DynaGrynd is DynaVap's purpose-built herb preparation accessory, engineered with vaporiser performance in mind. The two-piece aluminium body pairs with a fixed stainless steel cutting plate to deliver a repeatable, medium-fine grind that suits the airflow requirements of both convection and conduction devices. Rather than chopping through material with interlocking teeth, the stainless steel plate shears it cleanly, producing a more consistent particle size with noticeably less drag. Its attachment rate is strongest in stores and online catalogues where DynaVap's M series, VonG, or Hyper Tip variants are prominently displayed, as customers actively seek compatible accessories to…

specs.label: Compatibility
specs.value: All DynaVap devices; universal vaporiser use
